home.heroSubtitle: Answer 13 focused questions. Get a complete, professional website brief — paste it into any AI builder or coding tool. Verified for Bolt, Cursor, v0, Lovable, and Arena.ai.
home.heroMicrocopy: No sign-up · Nothing stored · About 2 minutes
home.platformsCaption: Plain text — works in any AI builder or coding tool you prefer.
home.compareTitle: Why a brief beats a one-line prompt
home.compareSubtitle: Same AI builder. Two very different starting points.
home.withoutSample: make me a website for my coffee shop, modern looking, with menu and contact
home.withoutItem0: Generic hero, vague tone of voice
home.withoutItem1: Pages and features the AI guesses at
home.withoutItem2: Restart from scratch when it misses
home.withItem0: Audience, tone, and visual direction nailed
home.withItem1: Exact pages, sections, and features specified
home.withItem2: Tech stack and code standards locked in
home.withFooter: One paste. AI builds it right the first time.
home.howItWorksTitle: Three steps to a builder-ready brief
home.step0desc: Four sections — Basics, Audience, Content, Tech. Every question is purposeful. Skip the optional ones freely.
home.step1desc: Claude synthesizes your answers into one flowing brief — design, pages, features, code standards, tech stack.
home.step2desc: Open your AI builder. Paste. Build. No follow-up questions.
home.ioTitle: 13 questions in. A complete brief out.
home.ioSubtitle: Everything an AI builder needs — nothing it doesn't.
home.covered0items: Business name & tagline, website type, industry niche, primary goal
home.covered1items: Target audience, visual style, tone of voice, brand colors
home.covered2items: Required pages, content readiness, copy strategy
home.covered3items: Special functionality, tech stack, references & inspiration
home.examplesSubtitle: Real sites built by pasting one generated brief into an AI builder. No edits. No follow-ups.
home.faq0a: ChatGPT will write you a website prompt — but it won't prompt you for what to include. The 13 questions catch what people forget: brand tone, page hierarchy, code standards, tech stack constraints. The brief comes out the same, but with nothing missing.
home.faq1a: No. Answers are sent to Claude to generate your brief, then discarded. No accounts, no analytics on what you wrote, nothing stored on our side.
home.faq2q: I'm a developer. Do I need this?
home.faq2a: If you write your own prompts well, no. If you've ever pasted a half-thought brief into Cursor and watched it guess at the rest, this saves the back-and-forth. The output is plain text — edit it however you want before pasting.
home.faq3q: Can I edit the brief after?
home.faq3a: Yes. The result is plain text. Tweak any line, add your own constraints, or strip parts you don't need before pasting into your AI builder.
home.faq4q: Does it only work with the platforms listed?
home.faq4a: No. The brief is plain text — paste it into any AI builder, coding assistant, or chat tool. Bolt, Cursor, v0, Lovable, and Arena.ai are the methods we actively verify and keep step-by-step instructions for. It works just as well in Replit Agent, Windsurf, ChatGPT, Claude, GitHub Copilot, Gemini, and others.
home.ctaTitle: Stop briefing your AI builder in fragments.
home.ctaDesc: Two minutes. Free. Nothing stored. No sign-up.
home.footerTagline: Website Prompt Generator — generate AI briefs for your next web project

generator.introDesc: Answer 12 quick questions and we'll generate a detailed AI prompt you can paste into any coding tool.
generator.errorSelectOne: Please select at least one option.
generator.errorFillFields: Please fill in the required fields.
generator.skipWarningTitle: This field is optional — but it helps
generator.skipWarningDesc: The more context you provide, the more detailed and accurate your generated prompt will be. Even a few words here improve the result significantly.

model.label: AI Model
model.noModels: No models available. Please add at least one API key to .env.local.

review.subtitle: Almost there
review.title: Review your answers
review.desc: Check everything looks right. Click any answer to edit it.

result.title: Your website brief
result.attachDesc: You indicated you have existing copy or images ready. Paste them directly after this prompt when submitting to your AI coding tool — the brief already instructs it to use your content as the primary source.
result.freeNotice: All listed tools are free — most offer a free tier or a free trial on first sign-up. You can try the same prompt in all of them. Every method was verified working when this site was built. If one isn't available, simply switch to another tab.
result.boltStep3: Paste your generated prompt into the chat input.
result.boltStep4: Press Enter — Bolt will start building immediately.
result.lovableStep3: Paste your prompt as the project description.
result.lovableStep4: Click "Generate" — Lovable will scaffold your website.
result.arenaStep4: Select Claude Sonnet 4.6 as the model.
result.arenaStep5: Paste your prompt and press Enter.
result.arenaTip: For best results, choose Claude Sonnet 4.6 as the model — it gives the most detailed and accurate output.
result.cursorStep1: Open Cursor and create or open a project folder.
result.cursorStep2: Press Cmd+I (Mac) or Ctrl+I (Windows) to open the AI panel.
result.cursorStep4: Paste your prompt and press Enter — Cursor will scaffold the project.
result.v0Step2: Paste your generated prompt into the input at the top.
result.v0Step3: Press Enter — v0 will generate React components.
result.v0Step4: Copy or export the code into your project.

step.attachDesc: When you paste the generated prompt into your AI tool, add your existing copy and images directly after it. The brief will instruct the AI to use your content as the primary source.

questions.q1hint: Your contact details will appear directly in your website — the AI uses them to populate the contact section with real information instead of placeholders.
questions.q2label: What type of website do you need?
questions.q3label: What is your industry and niche?
questions.q3placeholder: e.g. sustainable fashion brand, B2B SaaS for accountants, local Italian restaurant...
questions.q4label: What is the primary goal of your website?
questions.q5placeholder: e.g. female entrepreneurs aged 28–45, small business owners who are not tech-savvy, Gen Z gamers...
questions.q6label: What visual style fits your brand?
questions.q7label: What tone of voice should the website use?
questions.q8placeholder: e.g. #1A1A2E and warm gold — or 'deep navy, cream, and terracotta'
questions.q10label: What is the status of your content?
questions.q10opt0: I have all text and images ready
questions.q10opt1: I have text but need image guidance
questions.q10opt2: I need placeholder text and image suggestions
questions.q10opt3: I need the AI to write all copy too
questions.q11placeholder: e.g. booking calendar, user login, live chat, product filters, payment checkout, map, multi-language...
questions.q12label: Where will you build or host your website?
questions.q12hint: Not sure? Pick the first option — the AI will choose the best fit. If you're using an AI coding tool (Bolt, v0, Lovable, Cursor), choose React/Next.js or Plain HTML.
questions.q12opt0: Not sure — AI picks the best fit
questions.q12opt1: React / Next.js — for Bolt, v0, Lovable, Cursor
questions.q12opt2: Plain HTML + CSS — simple, works everywhere
questions.q13label: Any references, inspiration, or extra context?
questions.q13placeholder: e.g. I love stripe.com for its clarity. Budget ~$3k, need it live in 6 weeks.
